creator: one@fbsduser.net.tr
text:
In Disk Label editor, when use 'Z' command for selected partition and
customize the behavior of command, the "CUST" text appear at the Newfs
column. But press F1 key and read help text about partitioning, it talking
about that, it will appear "CST" at the Newfs column..

Fix: 

replace another with which is correct.
